final:
module binary_counter_down (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output [11:0] count
);

    reg [11:0] invalid_count;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            invalid_count <= 12'b0;  // Reset the counter to 0
        end else if (enable) begin
            invalid_count <= invalid_count - 1;  // Decrement the counter
        end
    end

    assign count = invalid_count;

endmodule
